scripts.install-all: npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd backend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd ../frontend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.build: npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd backend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npx prisma generate && cd ../frontend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm run build
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.prisma:push: cd backend && npx prisma db push
